name: restart_daemon Directive-Completion Race Fix
goal: Add an optional directive_id parameter to restart_daemon() that atomically marks the directive completed in the DB before the pre-SIGHUP fork, closing the Brain restart-loop bug.

tasks.name: Add directive_id parameter to restart_daemon (method + MCP wrapper + tests)
tasks.description: Insert a new guard clause in OrchestratorTools.restart_daemon() that, when directive_id is provided, validates the directive exists and marks it completed in the DB before os.fork(). Update the MCP tool wrapper to accept and pass through directive_id. Add three new tests to TestRestartDaemon covering: directive marked completed before fork, invalid directive_id refuses restart without forking, and directive_id=None preserves current behavior.

steps.expected: Tests added to tests/test_orchestrator_mcp.py, not yet passing

steps.description: Run the new tests to confirm they fail (RED)
steps.command: PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python -m pytest tests/test_orchestrator_mcp.py -k "marks_directive_completed_before_fork or invalid_directive_id_refuses_restart or none_directive_id_unchanged_behavior" -v
steps.expected: First two tests FAIL with TypeError: restart_daemon() got an unexpected keyword argument 'directive_id'

steps.description: Update restart_daemon() method signature, docstring, and insert the directive_id guard + pre-fork DB write before os.fork()
steps.expected: src/ironclaude/orchestrator_mcp.py updated at the method definition and the guard block before the fork

steps.description: Update the @mcp.tool() restart_daemon wrapper to accept and pass through directive_id
Run the restart_daemon test class to confirm all tests pass (GREEN)
steps.expected: All TestRestartDaemon tests pass, including the 3 new ones and all pre-existing ones

steps.description: Run the full test suite to confirm no regressions
